MISSION

What Drives Me

Education should create independent thinkers, not dependent learners.

Through technology, mentorship and practical problem solving, I aim to create learning experiences that remain valuable long after the classroom ends.

WHAT I'M BUILDING

NPconscious

NPconscious is focused on curiosity-driven learning, technology-enabled education and long-term personal growth.

The goal is simple: help people become better thinkers, learners and decision makers.
